name: Three Threes
preceding_figure_names: Advanced Hip Twists, Basic Movements: Open, Closed Hip Twist, Curl, Hockey Stick, Open Hip Twist, Progressive Walks Forward, Spiral, Spot or Switch Turn to L (Lady to R)
following_figure_names: Basic Movements: Closed, Basic Movements: Open, Fan, Advanced Hip Twists, Continuous Hip Twists, Circular Hip Twists, Alemana (when ending in Fan Position), Hockey Stick (when ending in Fan Position), Sliding Doors (when ending in Fan Position)
notes:
Lady's alternative steps for steps 10 to 12:
2, 3: Dance 1-2 of Switch Turn to R (1/2 turn). Then, count 41: LF fwd, after having turned another 1/2 to R.
No turn on step 9, then turn 1/4 to R into step 1 and 2 of LF Side Cucaracha on count 2 3; then LF fwd. Then, LF fwd after having turned a further 1/4 to R.
Finishing Position: Man and lady can step fwd towards partners R side, followed by different Hip Twists.
Fan Ending:
Man:
Step 9 (41): Close LF to RF, 1/8 to L; Increase tone, L arm slightly fwd. R arm slightly back; then release hold allowing R hand to slide down Lady's R arm to R to R hand hold.
2: RF back, no turn; R arm towards L side, then change to L to R hand hold.
3: Transfer weight to LF, 1/8 to L, over count 3 4 1; increase tone in L arm.
41: RF to side in Fan Position. Slightly extend L arm.
Lady:
Step 10 -12: dance the finishing steps for Closed Hip Twist to end in Fan Position.
2: LF fwd passing in front of Man's body
3: RF fwd in line with LF, then turn 1/2 to L, body turns less; ending RF back
41: LF back in Fan position, body completes turn.

steps.action: Closed LF to RF, slightly back, end in TP
Close RF to LF in TP
Diagonal forward with part weight, slight body turn to R
Close LF to RF, slight body turn to L to normal position
Step forward then turn 1/2 turn to R
Replace weight to LF then turn 1/2 turn to L
